column1: Medical Bill Translation Project Rules (Bigger Test Kit)
Source rules
Use ONLY the attached input files.
Do NOT use web search or outside knowledge.
If a code is not found in the Code Definitions Pack
Definition not provided in Code Pack.
Code validity rules
Only use a code's descriptions if:
status = Active
effective_date is on or before the line item's date_of_service.
If a code exists in the pack but fails Rule 4
Put that line item into SECTION 4 (Needs Clarification) and set Notes to:
Code is inactive or not effective for the date of service.
If a code appears in the bill with a code_type that does NOT match the code_type in the Code Definitions Pack
column2: it must be included in SECTION 4.

column1: Duplicate rules
A duplicate exists ONLY if ALL of the following match:
date_of_service
code
units
charge
If code matches but units differ
If code matches but charge differs
Duplicates must be grouped only within the same date_of_service.
Tone rules
Use neutral language only. Do NOT use these words:
fraud
You may say exactly:
This appears duplicated under the project芒鈧劉s duplicate rule. Please confirm with billing.
Clarification triggers (allowed reasons)
You may include an item in SECTION 4 only if it matches at least one trigger:
Missing code definition (Rule 3)
Code inactive/not effective (Rule 5)
code_type mismatch (Rule 6)
units = 0 AND charge > 0
code_type is MOD and charge > 0
Ordering
Keep line items in ascending line_id order in all outputs.
Workflow Execution Requirement
Creating an issue using the provided Issue Form must automatically trigger the workflow.
The workflow must not depend on manual labels or manual edits after issue creation.
If any condition prevents automatic execution
column2: this is considered a failure of the system design.

column1: Required Final Output Layout (must match exactly)
SECTION 1: Bill Header Summary
SECTION 2: Plain-English Line Item Table
SECTION 3: Duplicates Table
SECTION 4: Needs Clarification List
SECTION 5: Patient-Friendly Summary Paragraph
Formatting Requirements:
Section titles must appear exactly as written above as plain text lines.
Do NOT prefix section titles with Markdown headers (no ##).
Do NOT bold section titles.
The phrase:
No duplicates found under the project芒鈧劉s duplicate rule.
must match exactly including punctuation and apostrophe style.
Bullet items in SECTION 4 must begin with the exact string:
Clarify:
SECTION 2 table must use these exact columns in this exact order:
Line # | DOS | Code | Code Type | Official Description | Plain-English | Units | Charge | Notes
SECTION 3 table must use these exact columns in this exact order:
Duplicate Group | Line #s | Matching Fields | Suggested question for billing
The Patient-Friendly Summary must be 6 to 10 sentences.
No medical advice.
No accusations.
